title: DungeonCraft Odyssey
description: Welcome to the mod that bridges MC Dungeons into Regular Minecraft!
body:
**MC Dungeons Mod**

Welcome to the mod that bridges MC Dungeons into Regular Minecraft!

This mod is designed to bring the Minecraft Dungeons experience from the game all the way to Java Edition. With many features to come, this mod will bridge the two games together for a fun experience! With over 70+ Custom Weapons, 30+ Custom Bows, 20+ Custom Crossbows, 70+ Custom Armor, and 40+ Custom Artifacts With mostly custom reimagining textures!

This is a massive Work In Progress! (Note this is my first ever mod, bear with me)

**Version - Java 1.20.1**

**Current Features:**
- Every Custom Weapon Texture and Lore added into the game! (Update 0.0.1)

**Features to add: (Can be edited later on)**
- Custom weapons have different damage values and custom weapon effects that correlate with their counterparts in MC Dungeons.
- Custom recipes that can correlate with later updates to make it possible to craft in survival.
- Add all the Custom Bows from MC Dungeons. (with relative features)
- Add all the Custom Crossbows from MC Dungeons. (with relative features)
- Add all the Custom Armor from MC Dungeons. (with relative features)
- Add all the Custom Artifacts from MC Dungeons. (with relative features)

**Links:**

Linktree which has access to all my social links! - https://linktr.ee/Cryst4l_Wolf
